title: Arch's Journey Mod
description: This mod recreates elements of Poteto143's "Arch's Journey" series in Minecraft.
body:
This mod is a Minecraft recreation of the work "Arch's Journey" posted by Poteto143 on Scratch, as a surprise for him. (Even after I actually showed it to him on November 20, 2022, I continued to add elements and make other updates.)

["Arch's Journey" (on Scratch)](https://scratch.mit.edu/projects/573520525/)

Currently, this mod contains elements that faithfully reproduce the original game, such as:

- The bow and abilities used by Arch, the main character in the original game

- Enemy characters that appear in the original game

- Gimmicks such as platforms, boxes, and rocks

- Elements from the sequel, "Arch's Journey Mysterious Comet"

- Elements that have not yet been revealed, as heard from Poteto143 himself!
